search:azure-cosmosdb-spring-data:spring.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az cosmosdb create --name <cosmos-db-name> --resource-group <resource-group-name> --kind GlobalDocumentDB`
  - `az cosmosdb sql database create --account-name <cosmos-db-name> --database-name <database-name> --resource-group <resource-group-name>`
  - `az cosmosdb sql container create --account-name <cosmos-db-name> --database-name <database-name> --name <container-name> --partition-key-path "/id"`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.1.0
  - Azure Cosmos DB SDK for Java: 4.25.0

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.uri`: The URI of your Azure Cosmos DB account.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.key`: The primary key of your Azure Cosmos DB account.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.database`: The name of the database to use.
  - `spring.data.cosmosdb.collection`: The name of the collection within the database.
